name: Takeshi Tatsumi
description: Former ETU star and member of the Japanese National Team, who transfers to a foreign club after a successful spell at ETU. After retirement as a player, Tatsumi coaches FC Eastham, an English Division 5 amateur team, into the fourth round of the FA Cup. Following his success with FA Eastham, he is convinced by ex-teammate Gotoh—now GM at East Tokyo United—to return to Japan and coach the team where he spent his years as a player.

name: Yuuya Fungami
description: Yuuya Fungami is a minor character in Diamond is Unbreakable. He is featured as an antagonist in Highway Star, and as an ally in Enigma Boy. Yuuya is a motorcycle gang member who was made into a Stand User by Yoshihiro Kira and prompted into attacking the Joestar Group. Selfishly attacking Rohan and Jousuke in a high-speed road chase with his Highway Star, Yuuya later assists Josuke in the fight against Terunosuke.

However, she is prone to becoming enticed with buxom women as a result of her time with her mother. This often puts her at a disadvantage against the assassins sent after her due to easily being distracted by the "assets". name: Chihiro Hashima
description: Chihiro appears as Itsuki's younger step-sibling. Chihiro is a dependable person who looks after everyone and attends high school.~!It is later revealed that Chihiro is a girl.!~

name: Dagger

He is closest with Joker and has a not-so-secret attraction to Beast, who makes it obvious that she prefers Joker.
